title: Glazed Silky Rich American Poultry Bake
description: A classic American dish featuring chicken, vanilla, and a sweet glaze, all in one pot. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: gluten-free all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a 1:1 substitute for traditional flour

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: use softened butter for best results

ingredients.name: brown sugar
ingredients.notes: use packed brown sugar for best flavor

ingredients.name: apple cider vinegar
ingredients.notes: use high-quality vinegar for best flavor

ingredients.name: honey
ingredients.notes: use high-quality honey for best flavor

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher salt for best flavor

ingredients.name: black pepper
ingredients.notes: use freshly ground pepper for best flavor

ingredients.name: chicken broth
ingredients.notes: use low-sodium broth for best flavor

ingredients.name: heavy cream
ingredients.notes: use high-quality heavy cream for best flavor

instructions: Season the chicken breasts with salt and pepper.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken breasts to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Transfer the chicken breasts to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a small bowl, whisk together the gluten-free flour, brown sugar, and vanilla extract.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and whisk until smooth.
Pour the glaze over the chicken breasts and smooth out with a spatula.
Dot the top of the glaze with the remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake the chicken in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
